text: Code reviews are a vital practice in software development. When developers review each other’s code before it is merged, they can catch bugs early, saving time and effort that would otherwise be spent fixing problems later. Beyond finding mistakes, code reviews encourage knowledge sharing within the team. Junior developers learn from more experienced colleagues, while everyone gains a broader understanding of the codebase. This collaboration naturally improves overall team quality, as shared standards and best practices become more consistent. Ultimately, code reviews transform individual work into a stronger, more reliable product.
